title: Money for Everyone
description: Adds a Money System with different Coins to your Multiplayer world
body:
This Mod is usally made for Survival Multiplayer to make a good trading System.


# Features:

Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite and Nether Star Coins
A Briefcase to hold your Coins at a good place
One Advancement
A Coin Flower
A ATM
A Coin refunding System
And more...


# Recipes:

The Recipes For The Coins are Easy: You must make a Coin Base then craft the Coinbase with the material in the Craftingtable and you have your Coin, you can also craft nine coins together to get a better coin (you can also craft it back).
The Briefcase needs 2 Iron Coins and 6 Iron Blocks and a Iron Bar.


# ATM Recipes:

For the Circuitboard you need 2x Gold Ingot, 2x Concrete, 2x Piston, 2x Iron Bars and a Diamond Coin
To Craft the ATM you need 8x Concrete and a Circuitboard


# Coin Refunding System:

When you wish to refund a Coin, you can smelt it in a Blastfurnace


# Languages:

English
German
Russian (RELEASED)
Brazil (PLANNED)
